title: Xtra Light Korean Soybean Sprouts Noodles
description: A light and rich Korean-inspired dish featuring blanched soybean sprouts and low-glycemic noodles, perfect for a healthy meal prep option. This dish is a polish on traditional Korean flavors with a focus on nutritious ingredients.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and blanch the soybean sprouts for 3 minutes.
Drain the soybean sprouts and rinse them with cold water to stop the cooking process.
Cook the low-glycemic noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat and saute the garlic and ginger until fragrant.
Add the soy sauce and sesame oil to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Add the blanched soybean sprouts to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with green onions and serve hot.
